headline: Great Wall of China
description: The Great Wall of China is a series of fortifications built across northern China from the 7th century BCE through the Ming Dynasty (1368-1644). Total length: 21,196 km (with all branches). Purpose: defense against nomadic invasions from the north. Contrary to myth, it is NOT visible from the Moon with the naked eye.

citation.name: The Great Wall of China: From History to Myth (2025)
citation.author: Waldron A.
